prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 ultra-detailed anime key visual of a futuristic idol singer performing on a massive cyberpunk concert stage in the year 2035. Show exactly one full-body female idol in the center, low-angle dynamic perspective, one arm thrust toward the viewer with a V-sign gesture and the other hand holding exactly one black microphone near her mouth. Her face is intentionally hidden by exactly two opaque censor-like overlays: one square muted mauve block centered over the face and one larger rounded purple rectangle in the upper-right over part of the hair and background screen. Give her very long flowing iridescent silver, cyan, violet, and pink hair streaming dramatically in all directions, decorated with futuristic headset ornaments and glowing accessories. Outfit: one holographic cropped idol top, one layered translucent prism skirt with angular panels, black and gold straps, neon star accents, bracelets, fingerless gloves, thigh straps, and exactly two shiny white iridescent knee-high platform boots with metallic buckles and yellow-black trim. Environment: a huge circular arena packed with a glowing pink audience, a reflective black digital stage floor covered in neon circuit lines, triangles, grids, and holographic UI markings. Behind her, place one enormous curved LED screen wrapping across the top of the arena with blue, magenta, and cyan data graphics and readable futuristic text such as "FUTURE IDOL STAGE 2035", "SHIKINAMI CODE:01", "LIVE", and Japanese-style characters meaning future. Lighting: explosive idol-concert spectacle with countless laser beams, starbursts, lens flares, sparkles, neon triangles, holographic shards, saturated electric blue, hot pink, violet, cyan, and yellow highlights. Style: premium glossy anime illustration, maximal detail, crystalline reflections, vibrant kiran-kiran sparkle aesthetic, dramatic foreshortening, clean sharp linework, high contrast, no watermark, no extra characters, no additional censor blocks.
